Home / Services / AC Repair

AC Repair

Complete air conditioning service for Memphis' humid summers.

When temperatures hit 95°F with 80% humidity, you need reliable AC. Our certified technicians perform thorough diagnostics using manifold gauges and leak detectors to find problems other shops miss. We specialize in:

Identifying refrigerant leaks with UV dye (common in older cars on Memphis roads)
Replacing expansion valves clogged by Southern pollen
Repairing blend door actuators that fail in our temperature swings

For classic cars seen at Memphis car shows, we offer R-12 conversions to modern refrigerants. All AC repairs include a free recharge if needed within 90 days and a cabin air filter check to keep Memphis allergens out of your vents.

Our Process

  1. 01 Step 1: Performance test and pressure readings
  2. 02 Step 2: Leak detection and component inspection
  3. 03 Step 3: Repair approval with upfront pricing
  4. 04 Step 4: System evacuation and recharge

Benefits

  • Cools 20% faster than quick-charge services
  • Uses environmentally friendly refrigerants
  • Includes free summer performance check
  • Proper oil charge prevents compressor failure

Frequently Asked Questions

Why does my AC stop working at red lights?

This usually indicates a failing condenser fan. We test these under actual Memphis driving conditions.

How often should AC systems be serviced?

Annual checkups are wise. Our humidity causes mold growth that clogs systems.

Can you fix electrical AC problems?

Yes, we diagnose wiring issues and faulty relays common in older Memphis vehicles.

Get a Free Estimate

Ready to get started with ac repair? Contact us today.

Request Quote Or call: 555-aut-r90
